global.description: The ad features a bold logo and clear messaging about a dinner offer.
global.main_message: Order dinner quickly and conveniently for €29.90.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'BiteRush' prominently displayed in white against a purple background.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'BiteRush' is large and eye-catching, set in a clean, sans-serif font.

elements.label: Dinner offer description
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes' is presented in a smaller font, conveying a sense of urgency and convenience.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€29.90' is displayed prominently, emphasizing the cost of the dinner offer.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Book now' is styled in a contrasting color, inviting immediate action from the viewer.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A vibrant purple background that enhances the visibility of the text and elements in the ad.

elements.label: Visual accents
elements.description: Subtle design elements that add depth and interest to the overall composition without distracting from the main message.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, BiteRush logo, dinner offer.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the body text and price, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Dinner in minutes, €29.90, Book now, BiteRush
